svg.title: NYC Urban Operations Intelligence Platform — End-to-end architecture diagram
svg.desc: A top-down pipeline diagram showing data sources, ingestion, Bronze/Silver/Gold lake layers, and the operational intelligence engine, across two phases: GCP Demo and self-built cluster.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the NYC 311 Service Requests data source')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the NYPD Motor Vehicle Collisions data source')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Open-Meteo weather data source')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the NYC Borough Boundaries GeoJSON data source')

g.text: Pagination · retry logic · late-arriving fact handling · execution_date partitioning

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Bronze layer in GCS for the GCP Demo phase')
sendPrompt('Explain the Bronze layer in MinIO for the self-built cluster phase')
sendPrompt('Explain the Spark ETL on GCP Dataproc for the GCP Demo phase')
sendPrompt('Explain the Spark + Iceberg ETL for the self-built cluster phase')
g.text: MERGE INTO · schema evolution · Deequ DQ

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Silver layer in GCS Parquet for the GCP Demo phase')
sendPrompt('Explain the Silver Iceberg tables in MinIO for the self-built cluster phase')
sendPrompt('Explain the BigQuery Gold layer and star schema design')
sendPrompt('Explain the MinIO Iceberg Gold tables and Trino query engine')
g.text: fact_* · dim_* tables via Hive Metastore

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain how the Operational Load Score is calculated')
g.text: Score = 0.4 × 311 volume + 0.4 × collisions + 0.2 × weather · per Borough per day

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me a sample of the Operational Load Score table output')
sendPrompt('Explain the Operational Drivers analysis output')
sendPrompt('Explain the Resource Allocation Recommendation output')
sendPrompt('What does the Looker Studio dashboard show for Phase 1?')
sendPrompt('What does the Metabase or Superset dashboard show for Phase 2?')
